no-restricted-syntax.message: Use a design token instead of a hardcoded hex color utility (e.g. bg-surface-subtle, text-foreground-muted, border-border). See app/globals.css for the token set. Intentional one-off accent colors can be added to the allowlist in .eslintrc.json.

Use a design token instead of a hardcoded hex color utility (e.g. bg-surface-subtle, text-foreground-muted, border-border). See app/globals.css for the token set. Intentional one-off accent colors can be added to the allowlist in .eslintrc.json.
